official_name: Automotive Information Sharing and Analysis Center
notes: Member-driven ISAC for the global automotive industry — OEMs, suppliers, dealers. Publishes the Auto-ISAC Best Practices Guide series and threat intelligence. Members-only.

data.official_name: Auto-ISAC Automotive Cybersecurity Best Practices Guide
data.notes: Members-only. Multi-volume guide covering automotive cyber design, supply chain, incident response.
